full_text:
Xu Shang 徐商
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Shang (徐商). General of Xu Huang, he helped defeat Guan Ping’s forces. Xu Shang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
